betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Drawer Networks & Upgrades§f

§aSupercharge your storage with high-capacity multipliers and centralized automation networks!§f

While individual drawers are highly useful, upgrading their capacity and linking them into a centralized system transforms your storage into a fully automatable inventory network.

§6Storage Upgrades§f:
§9Shift + Right-click§f a drawer with an empty hand to open its upgrade GUI. Each drawer has 5 slots for functional upgrades:
§b• Obsidian§f (Tier 1): Multiplies base storage capacity by §a2×§f.
§b• Iron§f (Tier 2): Multiplies base capacity by §a4×§f.
§b• Gold§f (Tier 3): Multiplies base capacity by §a8×§f.
§b• Diamond§f (Tier 4): Multiplies base capacity by §a16×§f.
§b• Emerald§f (Tier 5): Multiplies base capacity by §a32×§f.
§b• Void Upgrade§f: Destroys incoming items once the drawer is completely full. §cCrucial for automated farms§f to prevent pipe backlogs and item overflow lag.
§b• Conversion Upgrade§f: Automatically converts different mod versions of the same ore dictionary item.

§6Drawer Controllers & Slaves§f:
§b• Drawer Controller§f: The brain of your storage network. It connects all adjacent drawers (including those connected via §bTrims§f) within a §e12-block radius§f (a 25×25×25 cube area).
  - Pipe your items directly into the Controller, and it will §aautomatically sort and route§f them to the correct drawer in the network!
§b• Controller Slave§f: Acts as secondary input/output ports for your Controller network, allowing you to connect multiple extraction and insertion pipes to the same storage array.
§b• Drawer Key§f: §9Right-click§f drawers to §alock slots§f. Locked slots retain their item assignment even when completely empty, preventing other items from accidentally entering the slot.

§eTip§f: Build a Drawer Controller to unify your storage into one smart network — once a Controller is in place, you can pipe everything through a single face and let the system sort automatically.
